titleStmt.title: SII 22.103: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 103. (A.R. No. 103 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. ACHYUTADĒVA-MAHĀRĀYA—Śaka 1544, Nandana (Mistake for Śaka 1454 = A.D. 1532-3)

summary.p: The details of the date are given as Nandana, Mithuna, śu. 10, Hastā, Monday corresponding to A.D. 1532, June 10. This tithi was śu. 8 on this date. The inscription registers an undertaking given by the residents of Śaṇbai and the surrounding villages, comprising the Tānattār (Sthānikas), the Kaikkōḷas, the Seṭṭis and the members of the 98 castes of the Iḍaṅgai and Valaṅgai communities, to pay a contribution by impost of one paṇam from each big family and half a paṇam from a small one and also one paṇam on occasions of marriage, to provide for the maintenance of a maṭha presided over by Kāḷatti-Āṇḍār Magadaimaṇḍala-Śivaṉ disciple of Perumkaṟchūla-Parvatammāḷ Kāttayar (?). This is very probably the same maṭha mentioned in No. 101 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu cuvatti śrīmaṉ makāmaṇṭalecuraṉ pāṣaikkut tappuva Irāyar kaṇṭaṉ muvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭa nāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭa nāṭu kuṭātāṉ keca veṭṭai kaṇṭaruḷiya virappiṟutāpan naraciṅka
teyva kumāra Accuttaiya teyva makā Irāyar piṟutivi Irācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāttam 1000 5 100 5 10 4 Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa naṉtaṉa caṅkat tarattu mituna nāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu tecamiyum Attamu
m peṟṟa comavārattunāḷ peṇṇai vaṭakarai vāṇakoppāṭi nāṭṭil caṇpai Uṭaiyār tiruttāmtoṉṟi Āḷuṭaiya nayiṉār tevvatāṉamāna caṇpaiāṉa virarācentiracoḻapurattu tāṉattār kaikko
ḷar ceṭṭiyaḷ koyil cirmaiyil Uḷḷa perum kaṟcūla paṟvatammāḷ kāttayar ciṣyaṉ ciṣyaṉ kāḷatti Āṇṭār makataimaṇṭala civaṉukku nammuṭa koyil cimaiāṉa caṇpaiyum maṟṟum Uṇṭāṉa kiṟāmam palapaṭṭaṭaiyum Iṭaṅkai vala
ṅkai toṇṇūṟṟueṭṭu cātiyum Ākavum kāḷatti Āṇṭār maṭattil naṭakkum niṟuvākattukku kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭapaṭikku kuṭikku Oru paṇamum ciṟukkuṭikku Araipaṇamum kaliyāṇattukku Oru paṇamum yittu caṉtirātittavaraiyum naṭatta
(varaiyum naṭatta)kaṭavomākavum yitukku Akutam paṇṇiṉavaṉ kaṅkaik karaiyil kārāmpacuvaiyum taṉṉiṭa tāyi takappaṉaiyum kuruvaiyum konṟavan pāvat tile pokak kaṭavaṉākavum .
Digital edition of SII 22.103 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
